articles.title: Exciting progress for the Ramapo Police Department as we continue to advance our Drone as First Responder program. This week, we received ou
articles.snippet: Exciting progress for the Ramapo Police Department as we continue to advance our Drone as First Responder program. This week, we received our Skydio drone dock systems and completed preparation of the RAPTOR 1 launch site, including a fully refreshed and upgraded landing area. RAPTOR 1 and 2 will deploy a state of the art Skydio X10 DFR platform, enhancing our ability to respond quickly, safely, and effectively. We are grateful to Skydio CEO Adam Bry, CFO Callan Carpenter, John Chell and their entire team, as well as our partners at Axon , including Rick Smith, Mike Wagers, and Jim Voutour for their support and collaboration in bringing this capability to Ramapo. Looking forward to installation on March 31 and taking the next step as we put this technology into service for our community and our officers.

articles.title: Visit ISC-West Booth 14140 to see our newly announced DroneBooth™ (Patent Pending) — a rapidly deployable enclosure that enables 24/7 drone
articles.snippet: Visit ISC-West Booth 14140 to see our newly announced DroneBooth™ (Patent Pending) — a rapidly deployable enclosure that enables 24/7 drone dock operations in locations where permanent infrastructure isn’t available or practical. And combined with our Remote Pilot Services, it is a turnkey solution for security, inspection and construction progress. No power lines. No fiber runs. No costly buildout. Just a parking-space-sized footprint and the Flying Lion team handling the rest.

articles.title: Routine inspections don’t have to be complex, time-consuming, or reactive. With Spectro-AI's SAI-HUB, scheduling and executing autonomous dr
articles.snippet: Routine inspections don’t have to be complex, time-consuming, or reactive. With Spectro-AI's SAI-HUB, scheduling and executing autonomous drone missions becomes straightforward. Plan inspections daily, hourly, or continuously with dual-dock setups, and let your operations run with minimal manual intervention. Transform data into actionable insights using our AI algorithms. Our pre-loaded models detect vehicles, objects, smoke, and more, across both RGB and thermal sensors, enabling faster response times and better decision-making. We deliver a complete hardware and software solution that turns drone dock infrastructure into intelligent detection systems, without the need of an internet connection. Designed for industrial sites, inspection companies, and large-scale operations that require reliable off-grid aerial monitoring. If you are looking to streamline inspections, improve safety, and gain real-time situational awareness, we would be glad to show you how it works. Info@spectroai.a

articles.snippet: Managing a mega construction site requires constant visibility and coordination. At one of South Korea’s major semiconductor projects, SK hynix uses DJI Dock 3 with DJI FlightHub 2 to transform site management workflows.

articles.title: That picture is from 2019. The three of us are around a table. Franklin, Gloria, and I. The object between us is a drone prototype. We built
articles.snippet: That picture is from 2019. The three of us are around a table. Franklin, Gloria, and I. The object between us is a drone prototype. We built that thing in my student room in Buea. Fourth year of university. When I moved to the capital city of the Country, I carried it with me. Testing happened there. Two parts of the docking mechanism needed 3D printing, so we used a local facility for that. SkyBulb was the plan: a smart lighting system paired with an autonomous drone to replace bulbs at height for large infrastructure. Warehouses, factories, churches, street lights. No scaffolding. The drone docks to the fixture, swaps the bulb, and returns. We built the docking mechanism. It worked. The autonomous flying did not. Not with the resources we had at that stage. End of 2020, the project went on hold. (Not abandoned. On hold. Hardware teaches you to say the right one.) The lesson that stayed: hardware makes the gap honest. You can see exactly what is working and exactly what is not. You kn

articles.title: Having spent years working with both helicopters and drones, one thing is clear: this isn’t a competition — it’s a layered capability. A hel
articles.snippet: Having spent years working with both helicopters and drones, one thing is clear: this isn’t a competition — it’s a layered capability. A helicopter like the Robinson R44 brings undeniable advantages: • Speed • Endurance • Payload capacity • Operational flexibility At roughly $450,000 – $600,000+ acquisition cost (excluding fuel, maintenance, pilot, and operational overhead), it remains a powerful aerial asset vs $100,000 battery swopping drone in a box. But here’s the real question: - Can a helicopter outfly a drone? Yes. - Can it outfly a coordinated network of autonomous drones? That’s where things might change. Drone docking technology introduces: • Persistent aerial coverage • Rapid, automated deployment • Lower operational cost per flight hour • Scalable network capability Where it gets interesting is in use-case dynamics: Urban environments • Drones excel in rapid response, tight spaces, and real-time situational awareness • Faster “eyes on scene” in many scenarios Rural / wide-a

articles.title: 📍 🗺️ DJI Sky City, Shenzhen, DJI's global headquarters. I still can't believe I was one of the very few people from all over the world inv
articles.snippet: 📍 🗺️ DJI Sky City, Shenzhen, DJI's global headquarters. I still can't believe I was one of the very few people from all over the world invited by DJI Enterprise in Shenzhen for a week to discuss our use cases, ideas, and challenges regarding drone docks! 👨‍💼 🌏 👷‍♂️ This is everything you can see for now, but I can't wait to share more about future products and updates coming for construction site reality capture! 📸 Thank you so much for the invitation and all the discussions with your teams Grant Hosticka, Jason Cao, Freda Peng, Run Li and ZIXUAN WANG!

articles.title: We were incredibly honored that the Winston-Salem Police Department was personally invited to California for an exclusive Drone as First Res
articles.snippet: We were incredibly honored that the Winston-Salem Police Department was personally invited to California for an exclusive Drone as First Responder (DFR) Summit alongside some of the best in the industry. During this visit, we had the opportunity to tour the Skydio headquarters, where we witnessed firsthand the cutting-edge capabilities shaping the future of public safety. Even more impactful was our visit to their manufacturing facility. Meeting the dedicated professionals behind the drones and docks we rely on daily gave us a whole new level of respect for the craftsmanship and innovation involved. We were proud to share our DFR story which highlighted how our program has enhanced response times, improved situational awareness, and ultimately helped us better serve our community. It was equally rewarding to connect with agencies looking to build their own DFR programs and contribute to the growth of this critical technology nationwide. Thank you to Skydio for this incredible opportuni

articles.title: We're excited to announce our partnership and integration with Milestone Systems: bringing drone command & control directly into the XProtec
articles.snippet: We're excited to announce our partnership and integration with Milestone Systems: bringing drone command & control directly into the XProtect VMS dashboard. In our recent webinar, Nivedita walked through the Milestone Flink integration live, and the reaction in chat was immediate. Here's why it landed: The problem: Operators switching between FlytBase and Milestone during incidents = cognitive load + slower response time. The solution: Everything in one view. Telemetry, geofences, video feeds, mission dispatch; all inside the Milestone VMS dashboard. Security operators stay in their primary environment, Milestone while drones respond in seconds. No toggling. No friction. Just faster verification and better decisions. As Roy from Milestone said: operators don't want to juggle multiple systems. They want a single pane of glass. That's exactly what this integration delivers. Want beta access? If you're running Milestone XProtect and want to see this in your control room, reach out to supp

articles.title: Is Lagos ready for the $1 Trillion construction boom? The skyline of Lagos is changing, but the real revolution isn't just in the concrete,
articles.snippet: Is Lagos ready for the $1 Trillion construction boom? The skyline of Lagos is changing, but the real revolution isn't just in the concrete, it’s in the data. We’ve analyzed the top innovations set to dominate the Lagos Tech & Construction Conference this May 2026, and the future looks automated. If you’re a developer, engineer, or project manager in Nigeria, these 5 trends are no longer "optional" they are your competitive edge. The Top 5 Innovations Redefining Nigeria’s Infrastructure: 1️⃣ 3D Reality Mapping: Move beyond 2D. Generate high-resolution point clouds for precise volumetric measurements and as-built documentation. 2️⃣ Autonomous Drone Docks: 24/7 "set-and-forget" surveillance. Drones that self-charge and monitor site safety without human intervention. 3️⃣ AI Defect Detection: Stop structural issues before they start. Our algorithms automatically map defects in concrete and structural frames. 4️⃣ BIM Integration Software: Seamlessly sync your drone data with Building Informa

articles.title: Vandaag zet POM West-Vlaanderen mee de schouders onder hashtag #AeroFest in VLOC - Vlaams Luchtvaartopleidingscentrum en Drone Dock Oostende
articles.snippet: Vandaag zet POM West-Vlaanderen mee de schouders onder hashtag #AeroFest in VLOC - Vlaams Luchtvaartopleidingscentrum en Drone Dock Oostende. Dé ontmoetingsplaats voor iedereen die werkt aan de toekomst van luchtvaart, drones en nieuwe mobiliteit ✈️ Bedrijven, studenten en kennisinstellingen komen samen rond één doel: innovatie versnellen en bouwen aan oplossingen voor morgen. Van inspirerende talks tot gerichte matchmaking met jong talent: AeroFest toont hoe sterk het ecosysteem in West-Vlaanderen is én welke kansen deze snel evoluerende sector biedt. AeroFest partners: VIVES University of Applied Sciences, KU Leuven, petrus en paulus vti, VLOC - Vlaams Luchtvaartopleidingscentrum, Belgian Defence en POM West-Vlaanderen. hashtag #WestVlaanderen hashtag #innovatie hashtag #drones hashtag #luchtvaart hashtag #samenwerken hashtag #samenondernemen hashtag #POMhelptinnoveren

articles.title: Big congratulations to Darren Raj and AgriBugs on their acceptance into the F-300 AgFoodTech Accelerator! 🎉 AgriBugs has spent 10+ years de
articles.snippet: Big congratulations to Darren Raj and AgriBugs on their acceptance into the F-300 AgFoodTech Accelerator! 🎉 AgriBugs has spent 10+ years delivering multispectral drone insights that help farmers and researchers spot plant disease, evaluate irrigation performance, and better understand field conditions. Now, they’re pushing the frontier with patented autonomous drone technology built for agriculture—integrating off-grid drone docking stations, automated flight planning, and advanced imaging sensors to collect data, recharge, and keep operating with minimal human involvement. Key takeaways: Autonomous monitoring can reduce scouting time while increasing field visibility BVLOS (Beyond Visual Line of Sight) operations open the door to true “at-scale” aerial sensing Innovation accelerators + applied research partnerships help move prototypes into farm-ready tools We’re excited to see what’s next as this work advances through our IoT4Ag ERC Innovation Award within the Sentinel program at th
